I found your Dentist Appointment: May 18, 2024 · 09:00–10:00 · Downtown Dental Clinic (event ID 5). Do you want me to reschedule that event?

Tell me how you'd like to reschedule — choose one:
- A specific new date and time (e.g., May 22 at 10:00).
- A date range and time-of-day preference (e.g., any morning next week).
- “Earliest available after [date]”.

Also confirm:
- Keep the same location and duration (1 hour)? (yes/no)
- OK to notify participants by email? (I’ll send the calendar update automatically)

If you’d like, I can instead propose 2–3 open slots from your calendar — tell me which option you prefer.
